case_title: VANETTA LENNICE DUNLAP VS. MALCON ROBERT BRAGA SANTOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNLAP, VANETTA LENNICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANTOS, MALCON ROBERT BRAGA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNLAP, VANETTA LENNICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, MALCON ROBERT BRAGA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-02-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, MALCON ROBERT BRAGA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DUNLAP, VANETTA LENNICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, MALCON ROBERT BRAGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
